summary: Two new novel commands for populating local subscriber store without Enterprise tier: subscribers fetch-batch (--emails-from file, one-by-one /fetch/subscribers?email=X), subscribers import-csv (--from bento-export.csv).
reason: Bento's /fetch/search bulk endpoint is Enterprise-only; without these, the 4 analytical novel commands (churn-risk, winback, pre-delete, find) had no data source.
